craft: A CRAFT Pipeline for Evaluating LLM-Generated Data

Source: R/craft-package.R
craft-package.Rd

Implements the five-step C-R-A-F-T framework (Construct, Report, Assess, Field-audit, Translate) for evaluating data generated by large language models in political and social science research.

Step C - Construct role-task

role

Step R - Report dual-track metrics

reliab, reliab_pairs, valid, dual

Step A - Assess stability

stab

Step F - Field audit

audit, disagree, tau_sens

Step T - Translate to inference

dsl_fit, dsl_cmp

Report generation

report

See also

  • https://github.com/casstai/craft-r
